patch.content:
## The Great Modernization

Migrations M1 through M3 were a systematic sweep enforcing the Hard Rules retroactively on code written before they existed.

## M1: Emoji Purge

Every emoji replaced with zi() SVG icon calls. Emojis render differently across devices; zi() icons render identically everywhere.

## M2: Inline Style Extraction

Hundreds of inline style attributes extracted into CSS classes using design tokens.

## M3: Event Delegation

Every onclick attribute replaced with data-action delegation. A single event listener on the document body routes all clicks. Unglamorous work, but it transformed SproutLab into a codebase designed to last.

## Connecting the Dots

Cross-Domain Intelligence surfaces correlations that parents sense intuitively but cannot prove without data.

## The Six Cards

Sleep-Feeding Correlation. Diet-Digestion Patterns. Growth-Feeding Alignment. Activity-Sleep Impact. Vaccination Recovery. Daily Rhythm Analysis.

## Design Philosophy

Each card shows a headline insight, a supporting visualization, and a one-sentence interpretation. No card requires scrolling. The audience is a tired parent at 2 AM who needs signal, not noise.

## The Daily Briefing

Today So Far is SproutLab’s signature smart card — a real-time summary of everything that happened today.

## The Vertical Timeline

A chronological list of today’s events rendered as a warm vertical flow. A warmth gradient bar gives an at-a-glance quality score.

## Pattern-Based Nudges

The card nudges based on Ziva’s actual rhythms rather than textbook schedules. 12 functions carry the _tsf prefix. The spec went through 4 review rounds and reached 533 lines.
